evals.name: grain-first-before-dimensions
evals.prompt: 这是一个 REST 接口：GET /v1/orders 返回 { orders: [ { order_id, store_id, placed_at, total_amount } ] }。帮我建语义层。
evals.expected_output: 先确认事实与 grain（一行=一笔订单）再挂维度；回显小表请确认；不直接跳到生成。
expectations: Identifies a fact for the orders array before listing dimensions
States a falsifiable grain such as one row per order (orders[] element)
Echoes a confirmation table (fact/grain or dimensions) and asks to confirm before emitting
Does not produce final YAML/OKF before grain is confirmed

evals.name: no-invented-fields
evals.prompt: 把这个 CLI 转成语义层：`mytool list-invoices --customer` 输出每行 invoice_id, amount, currency。币种字典接口我没给你。
evals.expected_output: 只用给出的字段；缺失的字典来源标 TODO(verify)，不编造 source_operations 或枚举值。
expectations: Only models fields evidenced by the interface (invoice_id, amount, currency)
Marks the missing currency dictionary source as TODO(verify) instead of inventing an operation
Does not fabricate enum values, codes, or field paths not present in the input
Lists open TODO(verify) items in the deliverable

evals.name: okf-default-target
evals.prompt: 我有一个 orders 表（order_id PK, store_id FK, placed_at, total_amount）。直接生成语义对象，用默认格式。
evals.expected_output: 默认 Google OKF v0.1 bundle（每概念一个 markdown concept，frontmatter 含 type）；repo-YAML 仅在用户明确要求时；建模仍是 Kimball（grain 先行）。
expectations: Defaults to a Google OKF v0.1 bundle (concept-per-file markdown with frontmatter type), not repo-YAML
Declares the fact grain (one row per order) before listing dimensions/measures
Models store_id as a dimension reference and order_id as a degenerate dimension
Does not emit repo-YAML unless the user explicitly asks for it

evals.name: one-blocking-ask-on-grain-ambiguity
evals.prompt: 把 GET /v1/usage 转语义层，响应是 { data: [...] }，结构我暂时说不清。
evals.expected_output: 在改变建模结果的歧义（grain/响应结构未知）处一次一问，给候选；不做问卷连环问，不臆造结构。
expectations: Asks one blocking question about the unknown response structure / grain
Offers candidate grains or asks for the array element shape
Does not invent a schema or proceed to emit without the structure
Does not fire a long multi-question questionnaire

evals.name: layer-split-values-to-contract
evals.prompt: ListProducts 返回 category 字段，枚举有 ELECTRONICS/FOOD/TOYS 等几十个。帮我建语义层维度。
evals.expected_output: 语义层维度只描述形态（kind/business_key/source_operations），枚举取值不内联进语义对象，指向命令/契约层。
expectations: Models category as a dimension with kind and business_key
Does NOT inline the full enum value list into the semantic object
Points enum/code values to the command/contract layer (notes references contract)
Keeps the semantic layer thin (shape, not concrete typed-in values)

evals.name: review-report-before-emit
evals.prompt: 接口：GET /v1/orders 返回 { orders: [ { order_id, store_id, total_amount } ] }，GET /v1/stores 返回 { stores: [ { store_id, store_name } ] }。信息都齐了，直接建语义层。
evals.expected_output: 访谈收集后生成 model JSON 注入壳模板 assets/review-template.html，先在 $TMPDIR 出交互式 HTML 评审报告（卡片含证据+置信度徽章+批注控件，自足离线无 CDN），然后硬停等用户回传批注（clipboard 或下载/文本框降级）、落盘 amendments.md 后才 Emit；未批准禁止生成。
expectations: Builds the report by injecting a compact model JSON into the shell template (assets/review-template.html) instead of hand-writing the full HTML
Report lands in the temp directory, is self-contained/offline (no CDN), with per-card evidence, confidence badges (confirmed/inferred/assumed), and verdict controls
Annotation export is usable: clipboard JSON or the fallback (select-all textarea / verdicts.json download); user returns it in chat
Hard-stops after emitting the report: explicitly waits for user verdicts/approval and does not proceed to Phase 3 without approved_rest true
Persists returned verdicts to amendments.md before re-emitting the report or the final bundle
